source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image>Caption:
Individual images from a time lapse recording of one part of the main lawn at the Enﬁeld Shaker Village recorded on 16 October 2018. Inset graph shows the average pixel value across the highlighted region (yellow): ( ). Just after sunset (around 6 p.m.) (  p.m.) ( ). A few hours after sunset (around 10 p.m.) ( d 10 p.m.) ( ). After dew appears (approximately 2 a.m.) ( ). Just after dawn (approximately 7:30 a.m.). y
Question:
What is the general trend of the temperature across the lawn from sunset to dawn?
